examples: The differences between equivalent and real contact configurations of micro-EHL (elastohydrodynamic Lubrication) are analyzed.
The film thickness is analyzed with elastohydrodynamic lubrication theory, tooth elastic deformation computed by finite elements.
An elliptical cylinder model was built to analyze the effects of cylinder liner radial deformation on the elastohydrodynamic lubrication performances of piston ring.
